category_sources: Official mdBook documentation describes mdBook as a command line tool to create books with Markdown.
source_facts.description says mdBook creates modern online books from Markdown files.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and official documentation use mdBook casing.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the User Guide at rust-lang.github.io/mdBook for features, installation, and usage.
Official mdBook documentation page identifies itself as mdBook Documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/rust-lang/mdBook; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official mdBook documentation says it is for product/API docs, tutorials, course materials, search, themes, preprocessors, and backends, and is written in Rust.
source_facts.description identifies online books from Markdown.
